series_metadata.series_description: Each cardholder is required to maintain a weekly log of card transactions, which is then submitted to finance offices for reconciliation and review. These logs include credit card receipts, packing slips, etc. for verification of purchase; vendor information; purchase cost; spending fund.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Three years. Digitally scanned to OAKS ; Electronic: Three years. Digitally scanned to OAKS, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
